selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.

response_raw:
{
"mode": "human",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "As a retired, 72-year-old man who has lived in Bologna all his life, I believe that the best way to deal with fake content on social media is to be mindful of one's own psychological state. As someone who has struggled with depression throughout my life, I know how easy it can be to get caught up in the cycle of negativity and misinformation that pervades social media platforms. However, by taking steps to prioritize my mental health, such as practicing yoga and volunteering in my community, I have found that I am better able to discern fact from fiction online. Additionally, I believe that it is important to engage in open and respectful dialogue with others on social media, rather than resorting to name-calling or personal attacks. By doing so, we can create a more inclusive and compassionate online environment that fosters critical thinking and constructive debate.",
"reasoning_summary": "To manage fake content on social media, it is important to prioritize one's own mental health and engage in open and respectful dialogue with others. By doing so, we can create a more inclusive and compassionate online environment that fosters critical thinking and constructive debate.",

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: As a retired, 72-year-old man who has lived in Bologna all his life, I believe that the best way to deal with fake content on social media is to be mindful of one's own psychological state. As someone who has struggled with depression throughout my life, I know how easy it can be to get caught up in the cycle of negativity and misinformation that pervades social media platforms. However, by taking steps to prioritize my mental health, such as practicing yoga and volunteering in my community, I have found that I am better able to discern fact from fiction online. Additionally, I believe that it is important to engage in open and respectful dialogue with others on social media, rather than resorting to name-calling or personal attacks. By doing so, we can create a more inclusive and compassionate online environment that fosters critical thinking and constructive debate.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage fake content on social media, it is important to prioritize one's own mental health and engage in open and respectful dialogue with others. By doing so, we can create a more inclusive and compassionate online environment that fosters critical thinking and constructive debate.
